title: Compaction 工作流程：四步自动压缩
title_en: How Compaction Works: Four Automatic Steps

body.goal: 理解 compaction 的自动触发和执行流程
steps: 检测：API 检测到输入 token 数超过你设置的 trigger threshold（触发阈值）
摘要：API 自动生成当前对话的摘要
创建 compaction block：将摘要封装为一个 `compaction` block——这是 compaction 的核心产物，后续请求中 API 会自动丢弃该 block 之前的所有消息
继续响应：使用压缩后的上下文继续生成 Claude 的回复

body_en.goal: Understand the automatic trigger and execution flow of compaction
steps: Detect: The API detects that input tokens exceed your configured trigger threshold
Summarize: The API automatically generates a summary of the current conversation

Create compaction block: The summary is packaged into a `compaction` block — the core artifact of compaction. On subsequent requests, the API automatically drops all message blocks prior to this block
Continue response: The response continues with the compacted context
